## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

**Fixes:** # (issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Data Pipeline update

## Screenshots / Evidence
*Please attach screenshots of the Dashboard changes or terminal outputs showing successful Pipeline execution.*

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the Git Flow Branching Strategy.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (Data Dictionary / Business Glossary).
- [ ] I have tested this code locally and verified the Streamlit app does not crash.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linting errors.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published.
